Healthcare Specialties

Solo Practice to Multi-Specialty Group - We've Got You

Not a generic template. Every site is built around the nuances of your specialty, credentials, and the patients you actually want to attract - whether you're a solo NP or a 10-provider clinic.

Nurse Practitioners

FNP, PMHNP, AGPCNP - credential-first sites that build instant trust and rank for your specialty + city.

200+ NPs served

Physician Assistants

PA-C practices deserve a site that matches your clinical prestige and converts insurance-savvy patients.

80+ PAs served

Mental Health Providers

LCSW, therapists, psychiatric NPs - calm, trust-first design that converts hesitant first-time visitors.

95+ providers

Dental & Oral Care

Solo dentists to multi-doctor DSOs - showcase procedures, grow your reviews, and bring new patients through the door every week.

60+ dentists

Chiropractic & Rehab

Dominate local search and look more premium than every chain clinic and franchise in your city.

70+ clinics

PT / OT / Speech Therapy

Specialist therapists need specialist sites - your niche certifications and outcomes front and center.

45+ therapists

Multi-Specialty Group Practices

Solo NP to 10-provider clinic - one cohesive site that showcases every specialty, location, and provider.

Groups welcome

Concierge & Aesthetic Medicine

DPC, functional medicine, aesthetics - premium brand positioning that attracts the patients willing to pay.

Premium positioning
Growth Services

Your Practice Grows While You See Patients

I handle the content, search visibility, reviews, and scheduling setup - so you can focus on patient care while your practice keeps growing.

Done-For-You Content

Expert Written

Google rewards practices that publish expert, helpful content. I write and publish HIPAA-compliant blog posts, FAQs, and service pages for your specialty - so patients find you before your competitors.

The Process

Live in 7 Days. Not 7 Months.

A streamlined process built for busy practitioners who can't afford to wait.

Day 1Step 01

Discovery Call

We map your specialty, patient avatar, and competitive landscape in 30 minutes.

Days 2–4Step 02

Premium Design

Custom-built from scratch - zero templates, zero stock images, zero agency shortcuts.

Day 5Step 03

SEO Foundation

Technical SEO, local citations, Google Business optimization, and content strategy.

Days 6–7Step 04

Launch & Scale

Go live with full training, monthly reporting, and ongoing growth support.

ZmaxLab provides custom healthcare website design for NPI practitioners across all 50 US states including Texas, California, Florida, New York, Illinois, Pennsylvania, Ohio, Georgia, North Carolina, Michigan, New Jersey, Virginia, Washington, Arizona, Tennessee, Massachusetts, Indiana, Missouri, Maryland, Wisconsin, Colorado, Minnesota, South Carolina, Alabama, Louisiana, Kentucky, Oregon, Oklahoma, Connecticut, Utah, Iowa, Nevada, Arkansas, Mississippi, Kansas, New Mexico, Nebraska, Idaho, West Virginia, Hawaii, New Hampshire, Maine, Montana, Rhode Island, Delaware, South Dakota, North Dakota, Alaska, Vermont, and Wyoming. Specialties: nurse practitioners (NPs), family nurse practitioners (FNPs), psychiatric nurse practitioners, physician assistants (PA-C), mental health therapists, LCSW, chiropractors (DC), dentists, orthodontists, physical therapists (PT), occupational therapists (OT), speech-language pathologists. HIPAA-aware web design. Healthcare SEO. NPI directory listings.
